title: How I Built an AI-Powered Stock Market Dashboard
excerpt: A deep dive into Trader Koo – from teaching YOLOv8 to read chart patterns, to solving the coordinate mapping problem, to running a five-layer detection ensemble every night.

title: How I Built a Real-Time Weather Dashboard for Singapore
